Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID W. CHEN OF THE STRATMEN, PATTERSON & HUNTER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510)457-3440 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SATKAR HOSPITALITY INVESTMENTS AND TRIKON MANAGEMENT, INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Production For Production And Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys Fees - Defendant's motion to compel plaintiff to provide a verified answer interrogatories and verified response to the document request is granted. Plaintiff shall have thirty days from the date of this Order to accomplish same. Based on the facts and circumstances set forth in the opposition, the request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem; Steve Stein, Clerk: Cynthia S. Herbert, Not Reported. =302/jpt
